g.text: Find open PRs from non-collaborators that don't meet quality criteria and convert to draft.
The token used to authenticate to GitHub.
GitHub repository used to pull, push run images.
Triage a specific PR by number instead of searching.
Filter PRs to a specific author.
Only show PRs where review is requested for the authenticated user.
Only show PRs where review is requested for this user. Can be repeated.
Filter PRs by label. Supports wildcards (e.g. 'area:*', 'provider:amazon*'). Can be
Exclude PRs with this label. Supports wildcards. Can be repeated.
Only PRs created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Only PRs created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Only PRs updated on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Only PRs updated on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Include draft PRs in triage (normally skipped). Passing drafts can be marked as ready for
Only show PRs with workflow runs awaiting approval.
Only assess PRs with this CI checks state.
Only assess PRs that are at least this many commits behind base branch.
Number of PRs to fetch per GraphQL page.
Maximum number of non-collaborator PRs to assess (0 = no limit).
Sort order for PR search results.
Which checks to run: 'both' (API + LLM), 'api' (deterministic only), 'llm' (LLM only).
LLM model for assessment (format: provider/model). Use 'claude/' prefix for Claude CLI, 'codex/'
Number of concurrent LLM assessment calls.
If dry-run is set, commands are only printed, not executed.
Print verbose information about performed steps.
